captures.caption: On death the frozen screen now says so: GAME OVER prints across the middle in white, held there with the rest of the scene.
captures.alt: An enemy hits the ship; it turns red, everything freezes, and the words GAME OVER appear in white across the centre of the screen.

captures.caption: Now GAME OVER waits for input: a press of fire restarts from the top — the message clears, the ship is white again, the score resets to 00, and a fresh wave descends.
captures.alt: The GAME OVER screen is shown, then fire is pressed: the message disappears, the score returns to 00, the ship is white and controllable again, and new enemies start descending.
